CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-19-574217 WITH CASE CGC-17-558782
Off Calendar Apr-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE GROUP's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-558782 WITH CASE CGC-19-574217

Plaintiff Great American Insurance Group's motion to consolidate with lead case number CGC-17-558782 is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GREAT AMERICAN INSURANCE GROUP's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE

The application of Matthew L. McLean to appear as counsel pro hac vice for Plaintiff Great American Insurance Group is granted. No opposition filed, and the application meets the requirements of CRC 9.40.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
